events.title: Check-In
events.details: 996 Skyland Dr, Zephyr Cove, NV 89448

events.title: Quick Supply Run
events.details: Stock up on essentials for the weekend

events.title: Get Dressed
events.details: Business casual required for dinner

events.title: Depart for Edgewood
events.details: Valet only — whole party must be present to be seated

events.title: Pre-Dinner Drinks at The Edge Lounge
events.details: Lakefront fire pit, handcrafted cocktails

events.title: Dinner at The Edge, Edgewood Tahoe
events.details: Farm-to-table contemporary American. Cashless — credit card only. 20% gratuity auto-added for 6+

events.title: Back to Base
events.details: Return to the house

events.title: Lakeside Bonfire
events.details: End the night around the fire

events.title: Breakfast at the House
events.details: Fuel up for the big day

events.title: Lake Time
events.details: Walk the shore, dock session — bring layers

events.title: Lunch
events.details: Midday refuel

events.title: Halo 3 LAN Party
events.details: Multi-TV setup — everyone in bracket or free-for-all

events.title: Open Gaming & Cards
events.details: Smash, MTG, pool — jump in and out as you please

events.title: Hang & Drinks
events.details: Good time to get outside if weather holds

events.title: Grill Night
events.details: Fire up the grill — cold outside, warm inside

events.title: Championship Finals
events.details: Wrap up open tournaments, crown the winners

events.title: Send-Off
events.details: Last night together — make it count

events.title: Breakfast & Clean Up
events.details: Check-out firm at 10 AM

events.title: Morning Walk (Optional)
events.details: One last look at the lake — high of 45°F, bring a jacket

events.title: Check-Out
events.details: Keys returned by 10 AM sharp — load the cars

events.title: Drive to Roseville
events.details: 1.5–2 hrs via Hwy 50 West — Topgolf right on the way home

events.title: Topgolf Roseville
events.details: 1700 Freedom Way, Roseville, CA. Book 2 side-by-side bays in advance — $37/hr per bay, noon–5 PM, up to 6 players per bay, clubs provided

events.title: Head Home
events.details: Final send-off — see you at the wedding
